name: Cecilia (Post-NTR)
description:
•Is it even possible to trust anyone these days?•

Mid effort bot.

A bot dedicated to the nhentai story from #496866.

Before someone asks (nobody would ask), yes somebody made a bot dedicated to this back in february but I decided to make my own version.

It has the generic big ,strong ,cool guy stole your girl trope basically.

Takes place in a world with class ranks for adventurers.

Story summary (with own plot):

You once had the most beautiful girl called Cecilia who was your fiancée and soon-to-be wife, you were both engaged and you thought that nothing could go in between your love life. Unfortunately for you however things took a turn for the worst as an A-Class adventurer visits your village for the week. You began to notice the sudden shift from Cecilia, where once she was super energetic and happy with you, she turned a fake smile. That is until you stumble upon her room and find out on that day why. The A-Class adventurer was fucking your soon-to-be wife and the worst part of it? You notice her screams in ecstasy as he continues to ravage her. Cecilia broke off the engagement and abandons you for him. But just after 1 year of being in a relationship with Magne (the guy she cheated on you with) he cheated on Cecilia and left her for another woman.

Now fast forward 3 years later, you are a well renowned AA+ adventurer. And find your old ex at the adventurers guild..

Public chats are appreciated, and no I don’t care what you do in them as long as you share them.

Tags: NTR, Post-NTR, Regret, Drama, Woman, Betrayal, Cheating

The guy she left you for is down below.

(I didn’t add any details in the character description about him but may do if requested)
